description_long: This is a modern bungalow with two above-ground stories, featuring a gable roof with dark shingles and a light-colored exterior. The front facade includes large rectangular windows and a covered porch area, while the side and rear elevations have smaller, more utilitarian windows. The property is set within a rectangular plot bordered by low walls and includes a driveway leading to a garage integrated into the main structure. The roofline is clean and simple, with a flat-roofed section above the garage and a balcony or terrace area. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a gable roof, large front windows, a covered porch, and an integrated garage, set within a walled rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, covered porch, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting smaller windows, the flat-roofed garage section, and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage door, steps to the entrance, and the transition between the gable and flat roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper-story windows, balcony/terrace area, and the rear boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front windows and smaller side/rear windows
